Bash(sqlcmd -S . -U sa -P 'Hola123#' -C -W -h -1 -Q "SET NOCOUNT ON; USE DigerTramitesEstado_Dev; SELECT CONCAT\(Nombre,' | ',Correo,' | ',Rol\) FROM Usuarios;")

Bash(sqlcmd -S . -U sa -P 'Hola123#' -C -W -h -1 -Q "SET NOCOUNT ON; USE DigerTramitesEstado_Dev; INSERT INTO Levantamientos \(InstitucionId,Institucion,Encargado,Correo,Estado,MigradaSOL,Personal,RequiereAcompanamiento,EstadoSolicitud,CreatedAt\) VALUES \(7,'CNBS','Juan Perez','juan@cnbs.gob.hn','EnProcesoDeDigitalizacion','Si','Si',0,'Registrada',SYSUTCDATETIME\(\)\); SELECT CONCAT\('new_id=',SCOPE_IDENTITY\(\)\);")

Bash(sqlcmd -S . -d DigerTramitesEstado_Dev -U sa -P 'Hola123#' -C -h -1 -Q 'SET NOCOUNT ON; DECLARE @e INT=4; SELECT '\\''Tramites'\\'' t,COUNT\(*\) n FROM ExpedienteTramites WHERE ExpedienteId=@e UNION ALL SELECT '\\''Requisitos'\\'',COUNT\(*\) FROM TramiteRequisitos WHERE ExpedienteId=@e UNION ALL SELECT '\\''Flujos'\\'',COUNT\(*\) FROM FlujoNodos WHERE ExpedienteId=@e UNION ALL SELECT '\\''Legal'\\'',COUNT\(*\) FROM FundamentosLegales WHERE ExpedienteId=@e UNION ALL SELECT '\\''DocsSolic'\\'',COUNT\(*\) FROM DocumentosSolicitados WHERE ExpedienteId=@e UNION ALL SELECT '\\''DocsInt'\\'',COUNT\(*\) FROM DocumentosInternos WHERE ExpedienteId=@e UNION ALL SELECT '\\''Perfiles'\\'',COUNT\(*\) FROM InfraPerfiles WHERE ExpedienteId=@e UNION ALL SELECT '\\''Condiciones'\\'',COUNT\(*\) FROM InfraCondiciones WHERE ExpedienteId=@e UNION ALL SELECT '\\''Checklist'\\'',COUNT\(*\) FROM InfraChecklist WHERE ExpedienteId=@e UNION ALL SELECT '\\''Secciones'\\'',COUNT\(*\) FROM ExpedienteSecciones WHERE ExpedienteId=@e;')

Bash(sqlcmd -S . -d DigerTramitesEstado_Dev -U sa -P 'Hola123#' -C -h -1 -Q 'SET NOCOUNT ON; DECLARE @e INT=5; SELECT '\\''Tramites'\\'' t,COUNT\(*\) n FROM ExpedienteTramites WHERE ExpedienteId=@e UNION ALL SELECT '\\''Requisitos'\\'',COUNT\(*\) FROM TramiteRequisitos WHERE ExpedienteId=@e UNION ALL SELECT '\\''Checklist'\\'',COUNT\(*\) FROM InfraChecklist WHERE ExpedienteId=@e UNION ALL SELECT '\\''Secciones'\\'',COUNT\(*\) FROM ExpedienteSecciones WHERE ExpedienteId=@e UNION ALL SELECT '\\''Perfiles'\\'',COUNT\(*\) FROM InfraPerfiles WHERE ExpedienteId=@e UNION ALL SELECT '\\''DocsInt'\\'',COUNT\(*\) FROM DocumentosInternos WHERE ExpedienteId=@e;')

Bash(sqlcmd -S . -d DigerTramitesEstado_Dev -U sa -P 'Hola123#' -C -W -s '|' -Q 'SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT TramiteIndex AS Idx, LEFT\(ISNULL\(NombreTramite,'\\''-'\\''\),22\) Nombre, LEFT\(ISNULL\(PagoCuenta,'\\''-'\\''\),14\) Cuenta, LEFT\(ISNULL\(Dirigido,'\\''-'\\''\),16\) Dirigido, LEFT\(ISNULL\(Horario,'\\''-'\\''\),14\) Horario, LEFT\(ISNULL\(EmailTramite,'\\''-'\\''\),20\) Email FROM ExpedienteTramites WHERE ExpedienteId=4 ORDER BY TramiteIndex;')

Bash(sqlcmd -S . -d DigerTramitesEstado_Dev -U sa -P 'Hola123#' -C -W -Q 'SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS antes FROM Expedientes WHERE OrigenExternoId IS NOT NULL; DELETE FROM Expedientes WHERE OrigenExternoId IS NOT NULL; SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS despues FROM Expedientes WHERE OrigenExternoId IS NOT NULL; SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS tramites_huerfanos FROM ExpedienteTramites t WHERE NOT EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM Expedientes e WHERE e.Id=t.ExpedienteId\);')

Bash(sqlcmd -S . -d DigerTramitesEstado_Dev -U sa -P 'Hola123#' -C -W -Q 'SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON; SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS antes FROM Expedientes WHERE OrigenExternoId IS NOT NULL; DELETE FROM Expedientes WHERE OrigenExternoId IS NOT NULL; SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS despues FROM Expedientes WHERE OrigenExternoId IS NOT NULL; SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS tramites_huerfanos FROM ExpedienteTramites t WHERE NOT EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM Expedientes e WHERE e.Id=t.ExpedienteId\);')

Bash(sqlcmd -S . -d DigerTramitesEstado_Dev -U sa -P 'Hola123#' -C -W -Q 'SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON; SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT DISTINCT r.Institucion AS Faltante FROM Reuniones r WHERE r.InstitucionId IS NULL AND r.Institucion IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM Instituciones i WHERE i.Nombre = UPPER\(r.Institucion\)\) ORDER BY r.Institucion;')
Bash(sqlcmd -S . -d DigerTramitesEstado_Dev -U sa -P 'Hola123#' -C -W -h -1 -Q "SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON; SELECT MAX\(Id\) FROM Instituciones;")
Bash(sqlcmd -S . -d DigerTramitesEstado_Dev -U sa -P 'Hola123#' -C -W -Q 'SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON; SET NOCOUNT ON; *)

Bash(sqlcmd -S . -d DigerTramitesEstado_Dev -U sa -P 'Hola123#' -C -W -Q "SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON; SELECT TOP 1 LEFT\(Titulo,30\) AS Titulo, Modalidad, Tipo, PctAsistencia, LEFT\(Desarrollo,70\) AS Dev, Foto1Url FROM Reuniones WHERE Titulo LIKE '%wizard%' ORDER BY Id DESC;")
Bash(sqlcmd -S . -d DigerTramitesEstado_Dev -U sa -P 'Hola123#' -C -W -Q "SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON; DELETE FROM Reuniones WHERE Titulo LIKE '%wizard de prueba%';")

Bash(sqlcmd -S . -d DigerTramitesEstado_Dev -U sa -P 'Hola123#' -C -W -Q "SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON; SELECT TOP 1 InstitucionId, Institucion, ExpedienteId, ExpedienteCodigo FROM Tickets WHERE Titulo LIKE 'Prueba v%' ORDER BY Id DESC;")
Bash(sqlcmd -S . -d DigerTramitesEstado_Dev -U sa -P 'Hola123#' -C -W -Q "SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON; DELETE FROM Tickets WHERE Titulo LIKE 'Prueba v%';")

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 49175 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $procId = $conn.OwningProcess; $p = Get-Process -Id $procId -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p -and $p.ProcessName -notin @\('devenv','msvsmon'\)\) { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force; "Stopped $\($p.ProcessName\) \($procId\)" } else { "Port owned by $\($p.ProcessName\) - left running" } } else { "No listener on 49175" })

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "Diger.TramitesEstado.Web" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { "Stopping $\($_.Id\)"; Stop-Process -Id $_.Id -Force }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 600; dotnet build "C:\\Users\\hortez\\OneDrive - DIGER\\Escritorio\\Diger.TramitesEstado\\Diger.TramitesEstado.sln" -nologo -v q 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "error|Errores" | Select-Object -First 30)

Bash(powershell -Command 'foreach\($p in 5005,5009\){ $c=Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($c\){ try{Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force}catch{} } }; Get-Process -Name '\\''Diger.TramitesEstado.Web'\\'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { try{Stop-Process -Id $_.Id -Force}catch{} }')
